SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Auto-Record All Calls
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Automatically record every inbound and outbound call

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Force Speaker Mode (Both Sides)
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Routes call audio to speaker so microphone captures both voices. Most reliable for both-sides recording on Android 9+.

Preference.android:title: Grant Call Recording Access
Preference.android:summary: Opens Special App Access settings to allow this app to see and record calls via InCallService — without replacing your phone app.

Preference.android:title: Set as Default Dialer
Preference.android:summary: Alternative to Companion Access. Gives deepest audio access. Requires this app to handle your incoming call screen.

Preference.android:title: ⚠️ Switch Back to System Phone App
Preference.android:summary: If you set this app as default dialer and calls aren't working, tap here to restore your original phone app.

Preference.android:title: View Recording Logs
Preference.android:summary: See what the app is recording, which audio source it used, and any errors

Preference.android:title: Clear All Recordings
Preference.android:summary: Permanently delete all recordings and audio files
